variants.title: RHR160S100V
variants.option1Value: Filtrec RHR160S100V3/AB1 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR160S100V
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR160S100V3/AB1. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR160S100V3/AB1 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
